user.title: Plant 1 — Sigen Plant
user.description: Select the Home Assistant entities for your first Sigen battery (Plant 1). Defaults match the standard Signenergy integration entity IDs.

plant2.title: Plant 2 — Sigen Plant 2
plant2.description: Select the Home Assistant entities for your second Sigen battery (Plant 2).

settings.title: Operational Settings
settings.description: These can be changed later via the integration options.

data.start_threshold: Start rebalancing when SOC difference exceeds
data.stop_threshold: Stop rebalancing when SOC difference drops below
